title: Commentary On The Website
summary: Posts that discuss the website itself as a project, forum, reading experience, or public space for exchange. This topic is intended as a durable editorial topic rather than a generated one.

subtopics.title: Praise, Gratitude, And Encouragement
subtopics.summary: Expressions of thanks, appreciation, praise, and encouragement directed at the site and its creators.

subtopics.title: Design, Navigation, And Usability Feedback
subtopics.summary: Comments about the design, layout, readability, navigation, and usability of the website itself.

subtopics.title: Content Requests And Participation
subtopics.summary: Requests for more material, invitations to contribute, and comments about who should participate or what the site should include.

subtopics.title: The Site As Dialogue, Archive, And Healing Space
subtopics.summary: Posts that treat the site as a place for dialogue, remembrance, healing, or public conversation.

title: Trauma, Memory, And Aftermath
summary: Posts about PTSD, difficult memory, grief, moral injury, and the lingering emotional effects of the war.

subtopics.title: Flashbacks, Haunting, And PTSD
subtopics.summary: Accounts of recurring memory, nightmares, haunting images, and PTSD-like aftereffects.

subtopics.title: Grief, Loss, And Mourning
subtopics.summary: Posts about loss, mourning, the dead, remembrance, and attempts to heal.

subtopics.title: Survival, Wounds, And Lasting Scars
subtopics.summary: Reflections on survival, emotional wounds, guilt, shame, and the damage that lingered after the war.

title: The Wall And Public Remembrance
summary: Discussion centered on the Vietnam Veterans Memorial, visits to the Wall, remembrance, and the meaning of public mourning.

subtopics.title: Visits To The Wall
subtopics.summary: Personal accounts of going to the memorial, standing before it, and reacting in the moment.

subtopics.title: Names, Remembrance, And Honor
subtopics.summary: Posts focused on names on the memorial, remembrance, honor, and public mourning.

subtopics.title: Maya Lin, Design, And Public Memory
subtopics.summary: Discussion of Maya Lin, the memorial design, and what public memorials mean.

title: Homecoming And Reintegration
summary: Accounts of returning home, social rejection, family strain, and the challenge of re-entering civilian life.

subtopics.title: Return, Reentry, And Civilian Life
subtopics.summary: Stories about coming home, reentry, and adjusting to civilian life after service.

subtopics.title: Rejection, Anger, And Alienation
subtopics.summary: Posts about rejection, hostility, alienation, and feeling unwelcome after returning.

subtopics.title: Family Strain After Return
subtopics.summary: Accounts of how return from Vietnam shaped marriages, households, and family relationships.

title: Protest, Politics, And The Meaning Of Opposition
summary: Arguments and reflections on protest, anti-war politics, patriotism, and disagreement about the war’s justification.

subtopics.title: Anti-War Activism And Protest
subtopics.summary: Discussion of demonstrations, anti-war organizing, protest culture, and public opposition.

subtopics.title: Patriotism, Loyalty, And Betrayal
subtopics.summary: Arguments about patriotism, support, betrayal, and what counted as loyalty during and after the war.

subtopics.title: Politics, Policy, And Blame
subtopics.summary: Posts about government decisions, political responsibility, hawks, doves, and the meaning of opposition.

title: Service, Duty, And Conscience
summary: Questions of enlistment, obligation, draft resistance, voluntarism, and moral conflict around service.

subtopics.title: Draft, Obligation, And Service
subtopics.summary: Discussion of the draft, obligation, deferment, and being called to serve.

subtopics.title: Volunteering, Enlistment, And Choice
subtopics.summary: Posts about volunteering, enlistment, and the meaning of choosing to serve.

subtopics.title: Conscience, Refusal, And Resistance
subtopics.summary: Accounts of refusal, conscientious objection, and moral conflict over whether to go.

title: Medical Care, Nurses, And Caregiving
summary: Posts about nurses, hospitals, wounds, medical treatment, caregiving, and the burden of tending to survivors.

subtopics.title: Nurses, Medics, And Corpsmen
subtopics.summary: Posts about nurses, medics, corpsmen, and medical personnel who cared for the wounded.

subtopics.title: Hospitals, Treatment, And Recovery
subtopics.summary: Discussion of hospitals, medical treatment, rehabilitation, and long recovery after injury.

subtopics.title: Caregiving And The Burden Of Care
subtopics.summary: Posts about long-term care, tending to survivors, and the emotional burden of caregiving.

title: Family, Children, And Generational Effects
summary: Stories about parents, spouses, children, and the ways Vietnam shaped later generations and family relationships.

subtopics.title: Spouses, Marriage, And Partnership
subtopics.summary: Posts about wives, husbands, marriage, and the strain placed on intimate relationships.

subtopics.title: Parents, Children, And Household Life
subtopics.summary: Discussion of fathers, mothers, children, and family life shaped by war experience.

subtopics.title: Inherited Memory Across Generations
subtopics.summary: Posts about later generations, family legacy, and how Vietnam was passed forward in memory and story.

title: Myth, Reality, And Historical Interpretation
summary: Debates over what Vietnam meant, how it should be taught, and how public narratives simplify or distort experience.

subtopics.title: Teaching, Schools, And Historical Framing
subtopics.summary: Discussion of teaching Vietnam, historical framing, and what should be passed on to students.

subtopics.title: Media, Books, Films, And Representation
subtopics.summary: Posts about how Vietnam has been represented in books, films, television, and other media.

subtopics.title: Meaning, Myth, And Interpretation
subtopics.summary: Arguments about myth versus reality and what Vietnam ultimately meant.
